name: budget-less-past-injected-default
description: C3R-1b (Car 3 review round 1 REJECT, Major; spec Amendment 2, issue #22): the reviewer constructed a byte-identical budget-less dispatched record and ran both fold bodies on it - pwsh rendered overdue/1800 (applying the real shop default), the un-threaded Go fold rendered dispatched/null - proving the spec 7b.1 carve-out that called shop-default application 'environmental IO' was a FALSE PREMISE (applying a default that changes rendered state is a fold SEMANTIC). This vector pins that exact scenario language-neutrally: a dispatched record with NO budget field, past an INJECTED shop default (input.defaults.dispatch_budget_seconds, never the real config file), renders overdue with budget_seconds equal to the injected default and budget_source='default'. Both fold bodies must thread input.defaults and agree. Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running the FIXED scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 (C3R-1 fix cycle commit, budget_source added) on this exact input, then reviewed for correctness against design S3.3/Probe 1 and the reviewer's reproduction numbers (elapsed 259200s, default 1800s).
